ReciteFootnote-1 in the name of your LordFootnote-2 Who created,Footnote-3
created man from a clot of congealed blood.Footnote-4
Recite: and your Lord is Most Generous,
taught man what he did not know.Footnote-6
for he believes himself to be self-sufficient.Footnote-8
Surely to your Lord is your return.Footnote-9
Did you see him who forbids
a servant (of Allah) when he prays?Footnote-10
Did you consider: what if he is on the Right Way,
Did you consider: what if he gives the lie (to the Truth) and turns away (from it)?
Does he not know that Allah sees everything?Footnote-11
No indeed;Footnote-12 if he does not desist, We shall drag him by the forelock;
by the lying forelock steeped in sin.Footnote-13
So let him summon his helpmates;Footnote-14
We too shall summon the guards of Hell.Footnote-15
No, not at all. Never obey him. But prostrate yourself and become nigh (to your Lord).Footnote-16
